title: Drug Signal Radar Input
description: Query drug intelligence from PubMed, FAERS, ClinicalTrials.gov, and FDA Enforcement

drugName.sectionDescription: Specify which drug to search for across all four sources.
drugName.title: Drug Name
drugName.description: Name of the drug to search (e.g., 'aspirin', 'ibuprofen', 'metformin'). Required.

dateFrom.sectionDescription: Narrow results by date range and severity.
dateFrom.title: Date From
dateFrom.description: Start date for filtering results (ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2020-01-01'). Optional.

dateTo.title: Date To
dateTo.description: End date for filtering results (ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2024-12-31'). Optional.

severityThreshold.title: Severity Threshold
severityThreshold.description: Filter FAERS adverse events by severity. 'serious_only' returns only serious events. Other sources are not affected. Optional.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many results to retrieve.
maxResults.title: Max Results Per Source
maxResults.description: Maximum number of records to fetch from each source. Free tier: 25. Paid: unlimited.
